description: Expose /upm, /pm, /plane-pm, /worktree, /refactor-max skills as first-class APM plugins via PluginBehaviour. Upgrade /worktree skill with APM integration.

existing_plugins: PlanePlugin (plane) — already implements PluginBehaviour; extend to match skill-plugin pattern
notes.scope_boundary: Plugins are thin Elixir adapters that call through to the skill logic via shell-out, HTTP to CCEMHelper, or in-process action handlers. Skills remain the source of truth for workflow logic. Plugins expose actions + LiveViews + nav items.

userStories.title: Define SkillPluginBridge behaviour extension
userStories.description: Create ApmV5.Plugins.SkillPluginBridge module that wraps PluginBehaviour with skill-specific conventions: skill_name/0, skill_path/0 (path to SKILL.md), skill_commands/0 (list of subcommands exposed as actions), dispatch_skill_command/2 helper that shells out or invokes in-process logic.
acceptanceCriteria: SkillPluginBridge module at lib/apm_v5/plugins/skill_plugin_bridge.ex
Defines @behaviour wrapping PluginBehaviour with added callbacks: skill_name/0, skill_path/0, skill_commands/0
Provides dispatch_skill_command/2 helper function with fire-and-forget Task option
Includes `use ApmV5.Plugins.SkillPluginBridge` macro that auto-implements plugin_scope/0 as :ccem and registers default nav_items/0
mix compile --warnings-as-errors passes
mix test passes with at least 3 new test cases

userStories.title: Create UpmPlugin with full workflow action catalog
userStories.description: Implement ApmV5.Plugins.Upm.UpmPlugin exposing the /upm workflow as 9 APM actions: plan, build, verify, ship, status, sync, integrity, usage, formation. Each action accepts workflow params (feature description, wave number, story IDs) and returns structured results.
acceptanceCriteria: UpmPlugin module at lib/apm_v5/plugins/upm/upm_plugin.ex
Implements SkillPluginBridge behaviour
list_endpoints/0 returns 9 action descriptors: plan, build, verify, ship, status, sync, integrity, usage, formation
handle_action/3 dispatches each action with param validation
plan action accepts feature_description, returns prd_path + plane_issues created
status action reads current prd.json and reports story/wave/checkpoint state
nav_items/0 returns Plan/Build/Verify/Ship/Status subitems
plugin_live_module/0 returns ApmV5Web.Plugins.UpmLive
mix compile --warnings-as-errors passes

userStories.title: Create PmPlugin as platform-agnostic adapter wrapper
userStories.description: Implement ApmV5.Plugins.Pm.PmPlugin exposing platform-agnostic PM operations with adapter resolution chain (--pm flag > project CLAUDE.md > pm-config.json default > active_pm global). Delegates to Plane/Linear/Jira adapters based on resolution.
acceptanceCriteria: PmPlugin module at lib/apm_v5/plugins/pm/pm_plugin.ex
Implements SkillPluginBridge behaviour
Actions: resolve_adapter, list_issues, get_issue, update_state, list_projects, board_state
resolve_adapter/1 returns {:ok, adapter_module} using 4-step resolution chain
Delegates all operations to resolved adapter (PlaneAdapter, LinearAdapter, JiraAdapter stubs exist in UPM codebase)
nav_items/0 returns PM Board, Resolver Status, Config subitems
Handles missing pm-config.json gracefully with sensible defaults
mix compile --warnings-as-errors passes

userStories.title: Refactor PlanePlugin to extend SkillPluginBridge
userStories.description: Migrate existing PlanePlugin to use new SkillPluginBridge behaviour while preserving all current actions (list_issues, get_issue, list_projects, board_state, search_issues). Add missing actions: create_issue, update_issue_state, list_cycles, list_modules.
acceptanceCriteria: PlanePlugin uses SkillPluginBridge behaviour instead of raw PluginBehaviour
All existing 5 actions still functional with identical signatures
4 new actions added: create_issue, update_issue_state, list_cycles, list_modules
skill_path/0 returns path to ~/.claude/skills/plane-pm/SKILL.md
plugin_scope/0 returns :ccem (was :apm)
Backwards compatible: existing handle_action/3 calls unchanged
mix compile --warnings-as-errors passes
mix test passes

userStories.title: Upgrade /worktree skill with APM integration metadata
userStories.description: Enhance ~/.claude/skills/worktree/SKILL.md with APM integration section: worktree registration on create, automatic APM project mapping, heartbeat on activity, cleanup triggers on prune. Add metadata tracking (created_at, branch, parent_session_id, formation_id).
acceptanceCriteria: SKILL.md includes new 'APM Integration' section with registration patterns
worktree create wrapper curls POST /api/worktrees/register with metadata
worktree list wrapper queries GET /api/worktrees for enriched metadata
worktree prune wrapper curls DELETE /api/worktrees/:id
New commands documented: /worktree status, /worktree link-session, /worktree apm-sync
Metadata fields: created_at, branch, base_branch, parent_session_id, formation_id, project, status
Fire-and-forget pattern for all APM calls

userStories.title: Create WorktreeStore GenServer for worktree lifecycle tracking
userStories.description: Implement ApmV5.WorktreeStore GenServer with ETS backing to track worktree metadata (create, list, update, prune). Provides REST endpoints at /api/worktrees/* for the upgraded worktree skill.
acceptanceCriteria: WorktreeStore module at lib/apm_v5/worktree_store.ex
ETS table :worktree_store with {worktree_id => metadata} schema
GenServer API: register/1, list/0, get/1, update/2, prune/1, list_by_project/1
Metadata schema: worktree_id, branch, base_branch, path, created_at, parent_session_id, formation_id, project, status
PubSub broadcasts on apm:worktrees topic for create/update/prune events
Added to ApmV5.Application supervision tree
mix compile --warnings-as-errors passes
mix test passes with at least 5 test cases

userStories.title: Create WorktreeController REST API + router routes
userStories.description: Implement ApmV5Web.V2.WorktreeController with 5 endpoints: GET /api/worktrees, POST /api/worktrees/register, GET /api/worktrees/:id, PATCH /api/worktrees/:id, DELETE /api/worktrees/:id. Delegates to WorktreeStore.
acceptanceCriteria: WorktreeController at lib/apm_v5_web/controllers/v2/worktree_controller.ex
5 endpoints wired in router.ex under :api_v2 scope
POST /api/worktrees/register accepts branch, path, base_branch, project fields
GET /api/worktrees supports ?project=foo filter
Response envelopes: {data: [...], count: N} for list, {data: {...}} for single
Error responses use standard {error: {code: ..., message: ...}} format
mix compile --warnings-as-errors passes

userStories.title: Create WorktreePlugin wrapping WorktreeStore
userStories.description: Implement ApmV5.Plugins.Worktree.WorktreePlugin exposing worktree operations as APM actions. Delegates to WorktreeStore. Provides LiveView at /plugins/worktree with list + inspector.
acceptanceCriteria: WorktreePlugin module at lib/apm_v5/plugins/worktree/worktree_plugin.ex
Implements SkillPluginBridge behaviour
Actions: list, register, get, update, prune, link_session, sync_git
sync_git action parses `git worktree list --porcelain` and reconciles with WorktreeStore
link_session action associates a worktree with an active session_id
nav_items/0 returns Worktrees, Sessions Link, Git Sync subitems
plugin_live_module/0 returns ApmV5Web.Plugins.WorktreeLive
mix compile --warnings-as-errors passes

userStories.title: Create RefactorMaxPlugin exposing refactor methodology
userStories.description: Implement ApmV5.Plugins.RefactorMax.RefactorMaxPlugin exposing refactor-max methodology as APM actions: scan_code_smells, generate_refactor_plan, execute_refactor, verify_refactor. Integrates with FormationStore for orchestrated refactor execution.
acceptanceCriteria: RefactorMaxPlugin module at lib/apm_v5/plugins/refactor_max/refactor_max_plugin.ex
Implements SkillPluginBridge behaviour
Actions: scan_code_smells, generate_refactor_plan, execute_refactor, verify_refactor, list_refactors, get_refactor
scan_code_smells accepts target_path, returns list of detected smells with severity
generate_refactor_plan produces structured plan JSON with phases
execute_refactor delegates to FormationStore to deploy refactor agents
verify_refactor runs mix compile + mix test + reports results
nav_items/0 returns Scan, Plan, Execute, Verify subitems
plugin_live_module/0 returns ApmV5Web.Plugins.RefactorMaxLive
mix compile --warnings-as-errors passes

userStories.title: Create UpmLive LiveView at /plugins/upm
userStories.description: Implement ApmV5Web.Plugins.UpmLive with 5 tabs: Plan (current prd.json viewer), Build (wave execution status + logs), Verify (tsc/integration/unit test matrix), Ship (commit/push/PR forms), Status (story/checkpoint/Plane state drift detector).
acceptanceCriteria: UpmLive at lib/apm_v5_web/live/plugins/upm_live.ex
Route mounted at /plugins/upm via router.ex
5 tabs with tab state in socket assigns
Plan tab reads active prd.json and renders story list with status badges
Build tab shows current wave, running agents, last tsc result
Verify tab shows 3-column test matrix (tsc/integration/unit)
Ship tab has commit/push/PR action buttons
Status tab shows 3-column drift table (prd.json | Plane | CLAUDE.md)
PubSub subscribes to apm:upm topic for live updates
mix compile --warnings-as-errors passes

userStories.title: Create PmLive LiveView at /plugins/pm
userStories.description: Implement ApmV5Web.Plugins.PmLive showing resolved PM adapter, available adapters status, and issue board viewer agnostic of underlying platform.
acceptanceCriteria: PmLive at lib/apm_v5_web/live/plugins/pm_live.ex
Route mounted at /plugins/pm
Shows resolved adapter for current project with resolution path breadcrumb
Lists all configured adapters with status (configured/unconfigured/unreachable)
Board tab shows issues grouped by state, agnostic of platform
Config tab renders pm-config.json editor

userStories.title: Create WorktreeLive LiveView at /plugins/worktree
userStories.description: Implement ApmV5Web.Plugins.WorktreeLive with worktree list (sortable by project/branch/created_at), detail drawer, git sync button, session link dropdown.

Route mounted at /plugins/worktree
Worktree list with filter by project and status
Click row opens detail drawer with metadata, linked session, formation
Git Sync button triggers sync_git action and refreshes list
Session link dropdown populated from SessionManager.list_sessions/0
PubSub subscribes to apm:worktrees topic

userStories.title: Create RefactorMaxLive LiveView at /plugins/refactor-max
userStories.description: Implement ApmV5Web.Plugins.RefactorMaxLive with 4 tabs: Scan (code smell report), Plan (generated refactor plan viewer), Execute (active refactor formation status), Verify (test matrix after refactor).
acceptanceCriteria: RefactorMaxLive at lib/apm_v5_web/live/plugins/refactor_max_live.ex
Route mounted at /plugins/refactor-max
Scan tab renders code smells grouped by severity with file path links
Plan tab shows phased refactor plan JSON with wave grouping
Execute tab shows formation agents and their progress
Verify tab shows tsc/test/compile matrix post-refactor

userStories.title: Create LibraryGraphBuilder — extract skill/agent/command/tool/pattern/learning relationships
userStories.description: Implement ApmV5.Library.GraphBuilder module that reads LibraryStore data (7 categories: agents, skills, MCP, tools, commands, patterns, learnings) and builds a relationship graph. Edges: skill calls skill, skill calls agent, skill uses tool, skill implements pattern, skill records learning, agent calls tool, command wraps skill.
acceptanceCriteria: GraphBuilder module at lib/apm_v5/library/graph_builder.ex
build_graph/1 returns %{nodes: [...], edges: [...], metadata: %{...}}
Node schema: %{id, type (:skill|:agent|:command|:tool|:pattern|:learning|:mcp), label, category, group, metadata}
Edge schema: %{source, target, relationship (:calls|:uses|:implements|:records|:wraps), weight}
Parses SKILL.md frontmatter for skill-to-skill references (e.g. 'Related skills:')
Parses agent prompts for tool invocations and skill references
Parses command files for underlying skill wrappers
build_graph/2 accepts filter opts: {focus: node_id, depth: N, types: [:skill, :agent, ...]}
mix compile --warnings-as-errors passes
mix test passes with at least 6 test cases covering all edge types

userStories.title: Add GET /api/v2/library/graph endpoint
userStories.description: Implement library graph REST endpoint in LibraryController. Accepts optional ?focus, ?depth, ?types query params. Returns graph data for D3 rendering.
acceptanceCriteria: GET /api/v2/library/graph route added to router.ex
LibraryController.graph/2 action delegates to GraphBuilder.build_graph/2
Query params: focus (node_id), depth (integer, default 2), types (comma-separated)
Response: {data: {nodes: [...], edges: [...], metadata: {...}}, count: N}
Supports ?focus=skill:upm to render the upm skill and its 2-hop neighborhood
mix compile --warnings-as-errors passes

userStories.title: Create library_graph.js D3.js hook — Railway-inspired node graph with Lottie animations
userStories.description: Implement LiveView hook rendering Railway-style force-directed graph with D3.js v7. Nodes colored by type (skill=blue, agent=green, command=orange, tool=purple, pattern=yellow, learning=gray). Edges labeled with relationship type. Lottie SVG animations for node entry/exit transitions.
acceptanceCriteria: New file assets/js/hooks/library_graph.js with LiveView hook
d3.forceSimulation() with forces: charge (-400), link (distance 80), center, collision
Node types distinguished by color + icon glyph (hero-icons SVG inline)
Edge labels show relationship type on hover
Railway-inspired aesthetic: dark #0f1420 bg, dot grid, glassmorphic node cards, soft glow on hover
Lottie animations for node pulse-in (300ms) and edge draw (500ms)
Pan/zoom via d3.zoom(), click node to push_event('focus_node', id) to LiveView
Keyboard navigation: arrows to pan, +/- to zoom, Enter to focus node, Escape to reset
Hook registered in assets/js/app.js Hooks object
Handles handleEvent('graph_data') with {nodes, edges, metadata}
Handles handleEvent('focus_node') to highlight and center a node

userStories.title: Add Graph tab to LibraryLive with focus inspector panel
userStories.description: Integrate graph view into LibraryLive as 8th tab (Graph). Left: D3 graph canvas. Right: node inspector panel showing selected node metadata, incoming/outgoing edges, related nodes, and deep-link to detail view. Type filter chips above canvas.
acceptanceCriteria: LibraryLive gains 'Graph' as 8th tab (after Learnings)
Graph canvas takes full width, inspector panel as right-side drawer (w-96)
Type filter chips above canvas (skill/agent/command/tool/pattern/learning/mcp) with toggle state
Focus dropdown: select any node to focus graph on it with depth=2
Depth slider (1-4) controls neighborhood radius
Inspector panel shows: node label, type badge, description, metadata JSON viewer
Incoming edges list (what calls this node)
Outgoing edges list (what this node calls)
Deep-link: click related node in panel jumps focus to that node
PubSub subscribes to apm:library topic for live updates
push_event('graph_data', ...) on tab activation and filter changes
mix compile --warnings-as-errors passes

userStories.title: v8.12.0 release — CHANGELOG, mix.exs bump, docs update, plugin registry wiring
userStories.description: Bump mix.exs and @server_version/@app_version to 8.12.0. Update CHANGELOG.md and priv/docs/changelog.md with skill-plugin integration + library graph. Wire all 5 new plugins into PluginRegistry auto-registration. Update OpenAPI spec.
acceptanceCriteria: mix.exs version: 8.11.0 -> 8.12.0
@server_version and @app_version updated to 8.12.0
CHANGELOG.md root + priv/docs/changelog.md have v8.12.0 section covering skill plugins + library graph
PluginRegistry init registers: UpmPlugin, PmPlugin, WorktreePlugin, RefactorMaxPlugin (and PlanePlugin refactored)
OpenAPI spec includes new /api/worktrees/* and /api/v2/library/graph endpoints
priv/docs/developer/api-reference.md documents new endpoints
versions.json has v8.12.0 entry
mix compile --warnings-as-errors passes
